subject: Luvale
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Valongi vatunge jilumbunwiso ja Litilicha javo nakujihakwila.
topics: Muchilongeselo echi, valongi vanatungu nakusambisa jilumbunwiso javo ja Litilicha.
